CREATE TABLE times_with_timezone (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO times_with_timezone VALUES (1, time(3) with time zone '18:40:05.123+02:00');
INSERT INTO times_with_timezone VALUES (2, time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000-05:00');
INSERT INTO times_with_timezone VALUES (3, time(3) with time zone '23:59:59.999+00:00');
SELECT event_time FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time = time(3) with time zone '18:40:05.123+02:00';
SELECT event_time FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time > time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000-05:00';
SELECT event_time FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time < time(3) with time zone '23:59:59.998+00:00';
SELECT event_time, id FROM times_with_timezone WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE events (id INT, description TEXT, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, 'Midday Event', time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000-05:00');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (2, 'Evening Event', time(3) with time zone '18:40:05.123+02:00');
SELECT e.description, e.event_time FROM events e JOIN times_with_timezone t ON e.event_time = t.event_time WHERE e.id = 1;

SELECT e.description, e.event_time FROM events e JOIN times_with_timezone t ON e.event_time = t.event_time WHERE t.event_time IN (SELECT event_time FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time > time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000-05:00');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time BETWEEN time(3) with time zone '00:00:00.000+00:00' AND time(3) with time zone '23:59:59.999+00:00';
UPDATE events SET event_time = time(3) with time zone '00:01:00.000+02:00' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM times_with_timezone WHERE event_time < time(3) with time zone '00:00:00.000+00:00';
